AI role hint: Choose how the assistant should think and respond.
No API key: Configure an API key in Settings → AI, or use server shared AI when available.
Stream magic hint: Get a quick suggestion based on your tasks and stream
Now ask AI hint: Open the assistant with context for “what now”
Confirm writes hint: When on, create/update/delete actions from the assistant wait for your confirmation.
API settings hint: API keys and models are configured under the AI tab.
